title: Frontend Developer
description: We are seeking a Frontend Developer to design, build, and maintain responsive, user-friendly web interfaces. The role includes translating UI/UX designs into high-quality code, integrating APIs, optimizing performance, and ensuring accessibility across browsers and devices. You will collaborate with backend engineers and product teams to deliver clean, maintainable, and scalable front-end features.
requiredSkills: HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript (ES6+), React, Responsive Design, REST APIs, Git

title: Backend Developer
description: We are seeking a Backend Developer to design, build, and maintain reliable server-side applications and APIs. The role includes developing RESTful services, integrating databases, optimizing performance, and ensuring security and scalability. You will collaborate with frontend engineers and product teams to deliver robust features, write clean and testable code, and contribute to system architecture decisions.
requiredSkills: Node.js, Express, REST APIs, SQL, MySQL, Authentication, Git

title: Instructor
description: We are seeking an Instructor to deliver engaging, student-centered instruction and develop lesson plans, assessments, and learning materials. The role includes classroom management, mentoring students, coordinating with department colleagues, and contributing to curriculum development and academic initiatives.
requiredSkills: Lesson Planning, Classroom Management, Curriculum Development, Communication, Assessment, Academic Writing, MS Office

title: Administrative Staff
description: We are seeking an Administrative Staff member to support daily office operations, handle records and documentation, coordinate schedules, and assist with finance and administrative tasks. The role requires strong organization, attention to detail, and effective communication with internal and external stakeholders.
requiredSkills: Office Administration, Records Management, Scheduling, Communication, Attention to Detail, MS Office, Basic Accounting

title: English Instructor
description: We are seeking an English Instructor to deliver engaging lessons, develop learning materials, and assess student progress. Requirements include a Bachelor of Secondary Education major in English. A master's degree related to the field of specialization is preferred. Preferably a passer of the Licensure Examination for Teachers (LET).
requiredSkills: Lesson Planning, English Language Instruction, Classroom Management, Assessment, Communication, Academic Writing, MS Office

title: Math Instructor
description: We are seeking a Math Instructor to teach mathematics courses, prepare lesson plans, and evaluate student learning. Requirements include a Bachelor of Secondary Education major in Mathematics. A master's degree related to the field of specialization is preferred. Preferably a passer of the Licensure Examination for Teachers (LET).
requiredSkills: Lesson Planning, Mathematics Instruction, Classroom Management, Assessment, Communication, Problem Solving, MS Office

title: Faculty Member - Environmental Biology
description: We are seeking a faculty member for the BS Biology program (Environmental Biology). Requirements include a BS Biology degree, preferably with specialization in Ecology, Evolution, Biodiversity, Conservation Biology, Environmental Science, or Human Ecology. A master's or PhD in Biology with related specialization is preferred. Teaching, research, and extension experience are preferred but not required.
requiredSkills: Teaching, Curriculum Development, Ecology, Biodiversity, Conservation Biology, Research Methods, Communication

title: Faculty Member - Medical Biology
description: We are seeking a faculty member for the BS Biology program (Medical Biology). Requirements include a degree in Medicine, Veterinary Medicine, Animal Science, BS Biology, or related fields allied to BS Biology. A master's or PhD in Medical Biology, Medicine, Public Health, Animal Physiology, Animal Science, Veterinary Medicine, or allied fields is preferred. Teaching, research, and extension experience are preferred but not required.
requiredSkills: Teaching, Curriculum Development, Medical Biology, Animal Physiology, Research Methods, Communication, Laboratory Skills

title: Faculty Member - Chemistry
description: We are seeking a faculty member for Chemistry. Requirements include a BS in Chemistry or allied fields, preferably a passer of a licensure exam for Chemists. A master's or PhD in Chemistry is preferred. Teaching, research, and extension experience are preferred but not required.
requiredSkills: Teaching, Curriculum Development, Chemistry, Laboratory Techniques, Research Methods, Communication

title: Accounting Staff
description: We are seeking an Accounting Staff member to assist with bookkeeping, invoices, and basic financial reports.
requiredSkills: Basic Accounting, Bookkeeping, MS Office, Attention to Detail
